developer_response.body:
Hey mokahal.gamer! 👋
Thanks for checking out the game. We’ve made several improvements and fixes in recent updates to enhance gameplay, controls, and overall quality.

If you get a chance to try the latest version, we’d love to hear what you think — and if your experience improves, updating your review would really help us out.

— Gamotronix Studio 🏁

reviews.review_description: Loving the new seat adjustment and push start! Makes the driving feel super realistic. Please add new offroad tracks and buses to drive and have different experience
I'm stuck in a position to can't see and grab wheel

developer_response.body:
Hi bezabino1, thanks for reporting this.
You’re right — the height/seat positioning issue could make the wheel hard to reach in earlier builds. This has now been fixed in our latest updates, with improved player height adjustment and better wheel interaction.

Please try the newest version and reset your player height once at the start of the race. It should now work smoothly and be much more comfortable.

If the issue is resolved for you, we’d really appreciate you updating your review to reflect the fix. Your feedback directly helps us improve the game.

— Gamotronix Studio 🏁
